AuthError.title: Access Denied
AuthError.description: You do not have permission to access this page or your authentication has failed. This may be due to an expired or invalid sign-in link, or insufficient permissions. Please try again, request a new link, or contact support if the problem persists.

EscapeButton.toastMobile: Press the eject button to quickly leave this page

PortalLoginForm.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.
PortalLoginForm.altchaNotReady: Please wait for the security check to complete.
PortalLoginForm.altchaVerifyError: Security check in progress, please wait…
PortalLoginForm.invalidSecurityCheck: Invalid security check. Please refresh the page and try again.
PortalLoginForm.emailExplainerText: This will be the email address that our case workers use to communicate with you. You will use this email address to log into the portal in the future.
PortalLoginForm.ageValidationError: You must be at least 18 years old to continue.
PortalLoginForm.formFooterText: After clicking the submit button, you will receive a confirmation email in your inbox with a link to confirm your email address.
PortalLoginForm.confirmationHeader: We have sent a verification link to
PortalLoginForm.confirmationText: Check your inbox and click the link to complete sign-in. Check your spam folder if you don't see it. Use the button below to resend, or go back to enter a different email address.
PortalLoginForm.authenticatedExplainerText: You are already signed in to the portal. Click the button below to access it.
PortalLoginForm.orgReferralMessage: You are currently listed in Rainbow Railroad's system as an organization referral. Please reach out to your Rainbow Railroad contact to receive a link to our Partner Portal.
PortalLoginForm.wrongAudiencePortal: You are signed in as a partner user. This is the client portal login.
PortalLoginForm.wrongAudiencePartner: You are signed in as a portal client. This is the partner login page.
